# Futonix

> Futonix is a U.S. design-build and automation firm delivering healthcare, warehouse,
> commercial and multifamily projects end-to-end — plus the technology behind them
> (structured data, access control, security cameras, PA/telecom, and network & lighting
> controls). One accountable team handles design, construction and automation.

Futonix combines architecture, construction and low-voltage/building automation under a
single contract ("design-build"), removing the handoffs between designer, builder and
technology integrator. Rooted in Oklahoma, Futonix has delivered projects across Oklahoma,
Tennessee, Washington, Arkansas and Missouri, and is resourced to scale to new markets.

## Key facts
- Model: integrated design-build + technology/automation (single point of accountability)
- Markets served: Healthcare; Warehouse & Distribution; Commercial & Retail; Multifamily; Technology & Automation
- Reach: United States — projects in OK, TN, WA, AR, MO; resourced to scale nationwide
- Capabilities: construction & build-outs, structured data cabling, access control, security cameras (incl. facial recognition), PA/telecom, network & lighting controls, historic remodels
- Contact: hello@futonix.com

- [Home](https://udgok.github.io/Futonix-Website/index.html): Overview, process, sectors, FAQ.
- [Expertise](https://udgok.github.io/Futonix-Website/expertise.html): Services — design-build, general contracting, construction management, preconstruction, technology & automation, renovation. Built for emerging businesses, new locations and growing operators.
- [Sectors](https://udgok.github.io/Futonix-Website/sectors.html): Healthcare, Warehouse, and Commercial & Technology.
- [Projects](https://udgok.github.io/Futonix-Website/projects.html): Real selected work across the U.S.
- [Where we work](https://udgok.github.io/Futonix-Website/locations.html): U.S. footprint — OK, TN, WA, AR, MO.
- [About](https://udgok.github.io/Futonix-Website/about.html): The design-build approach.
- [Contact](https://udgok.github.io/Futonix-Website/contact.html): Start a project enquiry.

## Selected projects
- Dayco (Nashville, TN): Telephone & PA control across a 400,000 sq ft distribution warehouse.
- Swift Collision: Data, access control and security cameras with facial recognition.
- DSN: Complete facility build-out — construction, data and access control.
- Paradigm Oral Health (Bonney Lake, WA): Oral-surgeon practice build-out.
- The Eye Institute (Tulsa, OK): Complete ophthalmology practice build-out.
- The Reunion Apartments (Tulsa, OK): Historic remodel of an 80-unit apartment community.
- Self-storage portfolio: 400+ units across Rogers & Springdale, AR; Springfield, MO; Moore, OK.
- 7 Star Distributors (OK): Complete distribution-facility remodel.
- Specific Systems: Complete network and lighting controls.
- Shopping Center (Bartlesville, OK); IST Tulsa non-profit pantry build-out; convenience-store build-outs (OK).

## Common questions
- What is design-build? One contract and one team for design and construction — faster delivery, fewer gaps, single accountability.
- Where does Futonix work? U.S.-based; projects in Oklahoma, Tennessee, Washington, Arkansas and Missouri; resourced to scale nationwide.
- What does "automation" include? Structured data, access control, security cameras, PA/telecom, and network & lighting controls — integrated at handover.
